corollary4_2_fixed_price_lower_bound.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h binCount : ℝ}, (\forall (i : Agent), 0 \le values i) \to 0 < h \to (\exists i, values i = h) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to logb 2 ↑(card Agent) + 2 \le binCount \to totalValue values \le 4 * binCount * fixedPriceBenchmark values 1

fixedPriceBenchmark.statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] [Nonempty Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) (minWinners : ℕ) = (Finset.univ : Finset Agent).sup' (by obtain ⟨i⟩ = (inferInstance : Nonempty Agent) exact ⟨i, by simp⟩) (candidateFixedPriceRevenue values minWinners)

lemma6_1_fair_coin.statement: \forall {Index : Type u_1} (s : Finset Index) (keep : Bool), (productMeasure Index).real {side | (\sum i \in s, if side i = keep then 1 else 0) \le ↑card / 3} \le exp (-↑card / 36)

lemma8_1_truthful_monotone.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent), truthful M \to \forall (bids : Agent \to ℝ) (i : Agent) {low high : ℝ}, low < high \to allocation (update bids i low) i \le allocation (update bids i high) i

lemma9_2_threshold_domination.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent), truthful M \to IndividuallyRational \to NoPositiveTransfers \to BinaryAllocation \to \forall (bids : Agent \to ℝ) (i : Agent), \exists threshold, 0 \le threshold \land DeterministicOfferThresholdDominates (deterministicAuctionOffer M bids i) threshold

revenue.statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent) (values : Agent \to ℝ) = \sum i : Agent, M.payment values i

singlePriceRevenue.statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) (p : ℝ) = \sum i : Agent, if p \le values i then p else 0

theorem4_1_high_value.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h : ℝ}, 1 \le h \to (\forall (i : Agent), 1 \le values i) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to totalValue values \le 2 * (logb 2 h + 2) * fixedPriceBenchmark values 1

theorem6_2_random_sampling.statement: \forall {n : ℕ} [inst : NeZero n] (values : Fin n \to ℝ) (keep : Bool) {alpha : ℕ} {highValue : ℝ}, 0 < highValue \to (\forall (i : Fin n), values i \le highValue) \to ↑alpha * highValue \le fixedPriceBenchmark values 1 \to 1 - exp (-↑alpha / 36) - 40 * exp (-↑alpha / 72) \le (productMeasure (Fin n)).real {side | fixedPriceBenchmark values 1 \le 6 * (thresholdPriceAuction (crossSampleCandidateOfferThreshold side 1)).revenue values}

theorem7_1_weighted_pairing.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Agent] [inst_2 : LinearOrder Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h total : ℝ}, total = totalValue values \to 1 \le h \to (\forall (i : Agent), 1 \le values i) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to 4 * h \le total \to total \le 192 * (logb 2 h + 2) * weightedPairingRevenue values

theorem7_2_weighted_pairing_benchmark.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Agent] [inst_3 : LinearOrder Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h total s : ℝ}, total = totalValue values \to 1 \le h \to (\forall (i : Agent), 1 \le values i) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to 2 * h \le twoWinnerBenchmark values \to 2 \le s \to logb 2 h + 2 \le s ^ 2 \to twoWinnerBenchmark values \le 576 * s * weightedPairingRevenue values

theorem8_2_truthful_revenue_upper_bound.statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} {Price : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Agent] [inst_3 : Fintype Price] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Price] [LinearOrder Agent] (model : PaperTheorem82JournalRawCDFMonotoneOfferSourceModel Agent Price), paper_theorem8_2_raw_cdf_expected_revenue values price offerLaw \le fixedPriceBenchmark values 1

theorem9_1_bid_independent_lower_bound.statement: \forall (priceRule : List ℝ \to ℝ) {highValue alpha : ℕ}, 2 \le highValue \to 0 < alpha \to \exists highCount lowCount, ↑highValue * twoValueBidIndependentPriceRevenue (twoValueListBidIndependentThresholdPrice priceRule highValue) highValue highCount lowCount \le twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount \land ↑highValue * ↑alpha \le twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount

theorem9_3_deterministic_truthful_lower_.statement: \forall {highValue alpha : ℕ} (model : PaperTheorem93PrimitiveSetOfBidsDeterministicSourceModel highValue), 2 \le highValue \to 0 < alpha \to \exists highCount lowCount, (auctionFamily highCount lowCount).revenue (twoValueBidProfile highValue highCount lowCount) / twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount \le 1 / ↑highValue \land ↑highValue * ↑alpha \le twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount

totalValue.statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) = \sum i : Agent, values i

truthful.statement: {Agent : Type*} [DecidableEq Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent) = \forall (values : Agent \to ℝ) (i : Agent) (report : ℝ), M.utility values i (Function.update values i report) \le M.utility values i values

twoWinnerBenchmark.statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] [Nonempty Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) = twoWinnerFixedPriceBenchmarkValue values

weightedPairingRevenue.statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] [LinearOrder Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) = weightedPairingExpectedRevenue values
